card_description: Rachel (Brady) (meaning "Rachel = ewe/lamb (Hebrew)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Radio Free Albemuth*. Nicholas Brady's wife who witnesses his transformation and arrest. Name note: The lamb — innocent and sacrificed. The spouse who endures the partner's dangerous visionary calling. First appears in *Radio Free Albemuth*.

reference.brief: Nicholas Brady's wife who witnesses his transformation and arrest
reference.significance: The spouse who endures the partner's dangerous visionary calling
